_meta.recording: live grok headless session (-p --yolo --sandbox workspace --trust --no-leader), hook stdin captured verbatim by a recorder (PLAN-156 W0a lab)
_meta.sanitized: absolute lab paths rewritten to /tmp/grok-lab; all other bytes verbatim
_meta.note: PreToolUse — the ONLY blocking event on grok. NATIVE toolName run_terminal_command (NOT run_terminal_cmd, which the product's own headless doc says: the two surfaces disagree upstream; this fixture pins the hooks truth). Normalizes to Bash so check_bash_safety fires unchanged.
